name: Imperia — Porto Maurizio
character: sand lido, Parasio medieval quarter above
blurb: Primarily lido sand with a small free zone on Lungomare Vespucci, paired naturally with the Parasio medieval alley walk in the afternoon. The sequence that makes this worth the 50-minute drive is beach morning followed by an hour in the Parasio. Trattorias are on the lungomare.
